prompt: Using the provided reference image, keep the same scone photo and composition, but redesign the overlaid annotations to look more polished, colorful, and social-media-worthy, as if drawn with bright marker pens and sticker-like doodles. Clearly indicate that the scones on the left are cheese scones and the scones on the right are chocolate-and-raisin scones. Replace the previous handwriting with exactly 8 visible Japanese text callouts: こっちはチーズスコーン, "外サク、中フワ、チーズたっぷり", うまチーズ!, 焼きたて！スコーン・コレクション, 濃厚チョコ！&ジューシーレーズン, "チョコ＆レーズン", and two small "甘いひととき" notes near the chocolate-raisin scones. Add cute illustrated accents that were not in the original: a small cheese wedge on the cheese scone, two clusters of chocolate-chip doodles, a raisin/nut doodle, curved arrows pointing to each scone type, sparkles, hearts, confetti, and a party-popper accent. Use thick white outlines and drop shadows around the lettering so the annotations pop, while keeping the baked scones realistic and unobscured.
